description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 49 mins of coding time with a daily average of 2 hrs 48 mins. His time was mainly in Java (63%) and Markdown (23%), with the remaining 13% in other languages. The activity data shows work across 4 projects, and there were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded.
